results.rendered_html: ni-biḍa mf(ā)n. or ni-viḍa (prob. fr. biḍa = bila, a hole; cf. ni-khila) without spaces or interstices, close, compact, thick, dense, firm,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c. full of abounding in (instr. or comp.),  Hariv. ;  Śak. vii, 11  (v.l. for ni-cita)

results.rendered_html:
nivi(bi)ḍa a.
1 Without space or interstices, close, compact.
2 Firm, tight, fast; nibiḍo muṣṭiḥ  R. 9. 58 , 19. 44. 
3 Thick, impervious, dense, impenetrable;  R. 11 15. 
4 Gross, coarse.
5 Bulky, large.
6 Crooked-nosed.
